response.justification: While Bogdan brings over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and valuable entrepreneurial background as a founder, his profile is primarily that of a hands-on full-stack Staff Engineer. He lacks the director-level strategic scope and the deep, recognized AI and machine learning expertise required to drive enterprise AI platform strategy and advise strategic customers.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, meeting the minimum baseline requirement.
Entrepreneurial experience as the founder of GISCollective, fulfilling a preferred qualification.
Strong track record of knowledge sharing and inspiring others through technical workshops and talks.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI and machine learning expertise required for this specialized AI Strategy role.
Operates primarily at a Staff/Senior full-stack level rather than the required Director-level strategic capacity.
Does not hold the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
